mapper.select: SELECT * FROM inventory WHERE deleted = 0 AND expiry_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND expiry_date >= CURDATE() ORDER BY expiry_date ASC
SELECT * FROM inventory WHERE deleted = 0 AND expiry_date < #{today} ORDER BY expiry_date DESC
mapper.delete: UPDATE inventory SET deleted = 1 WHERE deleted = 0 AND expiry_date < #{today}
